definition:
χρηστότης, -ητος, ἡ
 (χρηστός), [in LXX for טוּב and cogn. forms ;] 
   1. goodness, excellence, uprightness: Rom.3:12 (LXX). 
   2. goodness of heart, kindness: Rom.2:4, 2Co.6:6, Gal.5:22, Col.3:12, Tit.3:4; before ἐπί, with accusative of person(s), Eph.2:7; id., opposite to ἀποτομία, Rom.11:22. 
 SYN.: see: ἀγαθωσύνη. (AS)
